title: Act 1 2026 - Act 1 2026 - Appropriation Act 2026
text:
[30th March 2026] Appropriation Act 1
REPUBLIC OF SEYCHELLES SUPPLEMENT TO OFFICIAL GAZETTE ACT
APPROPRIATION ACT, 2026
(Act 1 of 2026)
I assent
23rd March, 2026
AN ACT TO PROVIDE FOR THE SERVICE OF THE REPUBLIC OF SEYCHELLES FOR THE YEAR
ENDING 31ST DECEMBER, 2026.
ENACTED BY THE PRESIDENT AND THE NATIONAL ASSEMBLY.
Short title
1. This Act may be cited as the Appropriation Act, 2026.
Authorisation of expenditure
2. The Minister of Finance, Economic Planning, Trade and Investment, may by
warrant under the hand of the Minister authorise the issue from the Consolidated Fund for the
services of the Republic for the year 2026, of a sum not exceeding Eleven billion, eight
hundred and forty two million, six hundred and eighty two thousand, five hundred and
twenty one (R 11, 842, 682, 521) which sum shall be appropriated in accordance with the
Schedule for the purposes specified therein.
